_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Kyber - Star Wars Battlefront II
author: vestmar@dominion.gg
description:
Hosts a Star Wars Battlefront II (2017) dedicated server using a custom Kyber Docker image with WISP/Pterodactyl permission fixes applied.

The install script will automatically download the Kyber CLI and SWBF2 game files using your EA token.

Custom image: https://github.com/Stodgems/kyber-wisp-egg
Kyber GitHub: https://github.com/ArmchairDevelopers/Kyber
Kyber Docs:   https://docs.kyber.gg

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# -------------------------------------------------------
# Kyber BF2 Dedicated Server - Install Script
# Pterodactyl / WISP Egg
#
# What this script does:
#   1. Downloads and installs the Kyber CLI
#   2. Sets up librust_lib.so shared library
#   3. Sets up maxima-bootstrap binary
#   4. Pre-creates .local directory structure
#   5. Downloads SWBF2 game files via kyber_cli download_game
# -------------------------------------------------------

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl unzip jq

echo "-------------------------------------------------"
echo " Kyber BF2 Server - Installation"
echo "-------------------------------------------------"

# --- 1. Download Kyber CLI ---
echo "[1/5] Downloading Kyber CLI..."
cd /tmp
curl -sSL -o kyber-cli.zip "https://api.prod.kyber.gg/download/kyber-cli-linux64.zip?branch=main"
unzip -o kyber-cli.zip -d /tmp/kyber-cli
cp /tmp/kyber-cli/kyber_cli /usr/local/bin/kyber_cli
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kyber_cli
echo "  kyber_cli installed."

# --- 2. Set up librust_lib.so ---
echo "[2/5] Setting up librust_lib.so..."
if [ -f /tmp/kyber-cli/librust_lib.so ]; then
    cp /tmp/kyber-cli/librust_lib.so /usr/local/lib/librust_lib.so
    ldconfig
    echo "  librust_lib.so installed."
else
    echo "  WARNING: librust_lib.so not found."
fi

# --- 3. Set up maxima-bootstrap ---
echo "[3/5] Setting up maxima-bootstrap..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.local/share/maxima
if [ -f /tmp/kyber-cli/maxima-bootstrap ]; then
    cp /tmp/kyber-cli/maxima-bootstrap /mnt/server/.local/share/maxima/maxima-bootstrap
    chmod +x /mnt/server/.local/share/maxima/maxima-bootstrap
    echo "  maxima-bootstrap installed."
else
    echo "  WARNING: maxima-bootstrap not found."
fi

# --- 4. Pre-create .local directory structure ---
echo "[4/5] Pre-creating .local directory structure..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.local/share/kyber/module
touch /mnt/server/.local/share/kyber/module/vivoxsdk.dll
chmod -R 777 /mnt/server/.local
echo "  Done."

# --- 5. Download SWBF2 game files ---
echo "[5/5] Downloading SWBF2 game files..."
echo "  This may take a while - the game is ~50-90 GB."

if [ -z "${EA_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "  ERROR: EA_TOKEN is not set!"
    echo "  Set it in the Startup tab before running the installer."
    exit 1
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/battlefront

kyber_cli download_game -p /mnt/server/battlefront -t "${EA_TOKEN}" &
DL_PID=$!
echo "  Download started (PID: $DL_PID). Monitoring for completion..."

while kill -0 $DL_PID 2>/dev/null; do
    if [ -f "/mnt/server/battlefront/starwarsbattlefrontii.exe" ] || \
       [ -f "/mnt/server/battlefront/__Installer/installerdata.xml" ] || \
       [ -d "/mnt/server/battlefront/Data" ]; then
        echo "  Game files detected - download complete. Terminating..."
        kill $DL_PID 2>/dev/null || true
        wait $DL_PID 2>/dev/null || true
        break
    fi
    sleep 10
done

if [ -d "/mnt/server/battlefront/Data" ] || [ -f "/mnt/server/battlefront/starwarsbattlefrontii.exe" ]; then
    echo "  Game files downloaded successfully."
else
    echo "  WARNING: Download may not have completed. Check /mnt/server/battlefront."
fi

# Cleanup
rm -rf /tmp/kyber-cli /tmp/kyber-cli.zip

echo ""
echo "-------------------------------------------------"
echo " Installation complete!"
echo " Game files: /mnt/server/battlefront"
echo "-------------------------------------------------"

variables.name: EA Token (Install Only)
variables.description: Your EA token used ONLY during installation to download SWBF2 game files. Generate with 'kyber_cli get_ea_token'. Expires periodically.

variables.name: EA / Origin Credentials
variables.description: Your EA account email and password in the format email:password. Used at runtime by Kyber Maxima. Use a dedicated EA account.

variables.name: Kyber Token
variables.description: Your Kyber authentication token. Never expires. Obtain with 'kyber_cli get_kyber_token' or from the Kyber Launcher.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server as it appears in the Kyber server browser.

variables.name: Server Description
variables.description: A short description shown in the Kyber server browser. Optional.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players. Hard cap from Kyber is 40.

variables.name: Map Rotation (Base64)
variables.description: Base64-encoded map rotation string. Generate via Kyber Launcher: Host tab > build rotation > Export.

variables.name: Mod Folder
variables.description: Path to the mod folder inside the container. Defaults to /home/container/mods. Place your .kmodcollection file and mod files in the mods folder via the WISP file manager. Leave blank to disable mod support.

variables.name: Plugins Path
variables.description: Path to the plugins folder inside the container. Defaults to /home/container/plugins. Place your Kyber plugin files here via the WISP file manager. Leave blank to disable plugin support.
